description: short pieces of technical communication and institutional reports.

white_papers.author: insper
white_papers.title: guide to electromobility for brazilian cities: public transport
white_papers.summary: presentation of business models, regulatory guidelines, and operational aspects to enable the energy transition in urban public transport fleets in brazil.

white_papers.author: itdp / ministry of cities / scipopulis
white_papers.title: acelerando a transição: estratégia para eletrificar a frota brasileira de ônibus
white_papers.summary: technical qualification and structuring of a strategy to replace bus fleets in brazil, aiming at the decarbonization of urban public transport.

white_papers.author: uitp / scipopulis
white_papers.title: large scale bus electrification: it systems checklist
white_papers.summary: it requirements for developing software to support operators and local authorities in the operational planning of bus fleets.

white_papers.author: uitp / scipopulis
white_papers.title: large-scale bus electrification: new challenges for it systems
white_papers.summary: technical analysis of new barriers related to data integration, smart energy management, and telemetry in electrified bus depots and fleets.

articles.title: an introduction to spatial econometrics for urban data
articles.summary: applying spatial autoregressive (sar) and spatial error models (sem) to understand housing dynamics.

articles.title: applied geostatistics: modeling spatial dependence
articles.summary: how to use semivariograms and kriging to predict continuous variables in unsampled territories.

articles.title: density and accessibility: urban metrics with spatial data science
articles.summary: quantitative methods to measure the impact of high-capacity transport proximity on land value.
